title: Diplotaxis griffithii
taxonomy: Diplotaxis griffithii is a species of plant in the family Brassicaceae. It belongs to the genus Diplotaxis, which consists of annual or biennial herbs native to the Mediterranean region and surrounding areas. The species Diplotaxis griffithii is further classified as belonging to the order Brassicales and the kingdom Plantae. The classification of Diplotaxis griffithii is also reflected in its botanical name, which is a combination of its genus and species names. Understanding the classification of Diplotaxis griffithii can provide valuable insights into its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.
